recommendations.title: Renegades
recommendations.overview: In the midst of the Balkan wars, a squad of Navy SEALs attempts to unravel a long-forgotten mystery after discovering an enormous treasure trove hidden at the bottom of a lake in Serbia.

recommendations.title: Alien Outpost
recommendations.overview: A documentary crew follows an elite unit of soldiers in the wake of an alien invasion.

recommendations.title: Navy Seals vs. Zombies
recommendations.overview: A team of highly skilled Navy SEALS find themselves embarking on the battle of their lives when they come face-to-face with the undead. After a deadly outbreak occurs in New Orleans, the SEALS must fight for their lives, and the city, against an army

recommendations.title: Behind Enemy Lines III: Colombia
recommendations.overview: Navy SEALS mount an attack on Colombian special forces to clear their names and rescue a hostage.

recommendations.title: Ambush
recommendations.overview: When a small outpost is ambushed, a US Army squad must take the battle below ground on a high-stakes mission in a new type of warfare the likes of which they have never seen.

recommendations.title: Edge of Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: Major Bill Cage is an officer who has never seen a day of combat when he is unceremoniously demoted and dropped into combat. Cage is killed within minutes, managing to take an alpha alien down with him. He awakens back at the beginning of the same da

recommendations.title: One Shot
recommendations.overview: An elite squad of Navy SEALs, on a covert mission to transport a prisoner off a CIA black site island prison, are trapped when insurgents attack while trying to rescue the same prisoner.

recommendations.title: Behind Enemy Lines II: Axis of Evil
recommendations.overview: Navy SEALS, headed by Lt. Bobby James, are dispatched to North Korea on a covert mission, all in an effort to take out a missile site...

recommendations.title: Coherence
recommendations.overview: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.

recommendations.title: Screamers: The Hunting
